description:
Join us on Tuesday, July 21st from 4-8 PM at Whispering Vine Fourth Street for a Flights & Flatbread tasting featuring Martinelli with special guest Brad Akkerman, National Sales Manager. Martinelli is one of Sonoma County's benchmark family estates, known for expressive Russian River Valley and Sonoma Coast wines from distinctive vineyard sites.

Tasting Fee: $40 (includes tasting and flatbread)

With Special Guest:

Brad Akkerman, National Sales Manager

Reserve your Spot

Featured Wines:

  • Martinelli Zio Tony Ranch Pinot Noir 2022 - Spiced red cherry, white pepper and wild herbs lead into a refined, mouthwatering Pinot with fine tannins and mineral lift.
  • Martinelli Bondi Home Ranch Pinot Noir 2023 - A deeper, savory estate Pinot with kirsch, ripe spice, pressed flowers, forest earth and a persistent, polished finish.
  • Martinelli Vigneto di Evo Zinfandel 2023 - Vibrant raspberry, dark cherry and molasses move into red currant, pomegranate, rhubarb and a smooth vanilla-cream finish.
  • Martinelli Rosé of Pinot Noir 2025 - Fragrant rose petal, wild strawberry and watermelon meet bright acidity, rhubarb, subtle minerality and candied blood orange peel.

Taste through a focused Martinelli lineup with flatbread included.
title: Martinelli Flights & Flatbread
